metadata.title: Ubuntu System Assessment Results - FedRAMP Low

activities.title: Mapped XCCDF evidence analysis
activities.description: XCCDF rule results were normalized and mapped to FedRAMP Rev 5 Low control identifiers.

steps.title: Parse XCCDF rule results
steps.description: Collected rule pass/fail results for all 6 Ubuntu servers.

steps.title: Map rules to controls
steps.description: Used component definition implemented-requirement Rule_Id properties to associate evidence with controls.

results.title: FedRAMP Rev 5 Low assessment execution results
results.description: Assessment results for the Ubuntu 24.04 LTS 6-server fleet evaluated against FedRAMP Rev 5 Low using mapped XCCDF evidence.

control-selections.description: ac-1: partially-satisfied (23 pass / 1 fail rule evaluations)
ac-2: partially-satisfied (23 pass / 1 fail rule evaluations)
ac-3: partially-satisfied (95 pass / 13 fail rule evaluations)
au-12: partially-satisfied (5 pass / 13 fail rule evaluations)
au-2: not-satisfied (0 pass / 6 fail rule evaluations)
au-3: partially-satisfied (5 pass / 7 fail rule evaluations)
cm-1: partially-satisfied (5 pass / 1 fail rule evaluations)
cm-2: partially-satisfied (5 pass / 1 fail rule evaluations)
cm-6: partially-satisfied (10 pass / 2 fail rule evaluations)
cm-7: partially-satisfied (10 pass / 2 fail rule evaluations)
ia-5: partially-satisfied (16 pass / 2 fail rule evaluations)
ia-5.1: partially-satisfied (174 pass / 36 fail rule evaluations)
mp-2: partially-satisfied (95 pass / 13 fail rule evaluations)
sa-3: partially-satisfied (5 pass / 1 fail rule evaluations)
sa-8: partially-satisfied (5 pass / 1 fail rule evaluations)

sc-28.1: partially-satisfied (19 pass / 5 fail rule evaluations)
sc-8: partially-satisfied (16 pass / 2 fail rule evaluations)
sc-8.1: partially-satisfied (16 pass / 2 fail rule evaluations)

entries.title: XCCDF scans executed
entries.description: Executed OpenSCAP security compliance scans on 6 Ubuntu 24.04 LTS servers.

entries.title: Control mapping analysis completed
entries.description: Mapped rule-level evidence to control identifiers using component definitions and regulatory mappings.

observations.title: Control ac-1 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control ac-1 is partially-satisfied based on 23 passing and 1 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects.

observations.title: Control ac-2 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control ac-2 is partially-satisfied based on 23 passing and 1 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects.

observations.title: Control ac-3 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control ac-3 is partially-satisfied based on 95 passing and 13 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects.

relevant-evidence.description: Mapped rules: accounts_password_pam_unix_enabled, accounts_root_gid_zero, accounts_umask_etc_bashrc, accounts_umask_etc_login_defs, accounts_umask_etc_profile, accounts_umask_root, ensure_pam_wheel_group_empty, ensure_root_access_controlled, file_groupowner_sshd_config, file_owner_sshd_config, file_permissions_sshd_config, file_permissions_sshd_private_key, file_permissions_sshd_pub_key, groups_no_zero_gid_except_root, no_invalid_shell_accounts_unlocked, no_shelllogin_for_systemaccounts, sshd_limit_user_access, use_pam_wheel_group_for_su

observations.title: Control au-12 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control au-12 is partially-satisfied based on 5 passing and 13 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects.

observations.title: Control au-2 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control au-2 is not-satisfied based on 0 passing and 6 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects (all rule evaluations failed).

observations.title: Control au-3 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control au-3 is partially-satisfied based on 5 passing and 7 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects.

relevant-evidence.description: Mapped rules: account_disable_post_pw_expiration, accounts_maximum_age_login_defs, accounts_minimum_age_login_defs, accounts_password_last_change_is_in_past, accounts_password_pam_dcredit, accounts_password_pam_dictcheck, accounts_password_pam_difok, accounts_password_pam_enforce_root, accounts_password_pam_enforcing, accounts_password_pam_lcredit, accounts_password_pam_maxrepeat, accounts_password_pam_maxsequence, accounts_password_pam_minclass, accounts_password_pam_minlen, accounts_password_pam_ocredit, accounts_password_pam_pwhistory_enabled, accounts_password_pam_pwhistory_enforce_root, accounts_password_pam_pwhistory_remember, accounts_password_pam_pwhistory_use_authtok, accounts_password_pam_pwquality_enabled, accounts_password_pam_ucredit, accounts_password_pam_unix_authtok, accounts_password_pam_unix_no_remember, accounts_password_set_max_life_existing, accounts_password_set_min_life_existing, no_empty_passwords_unix, set_password_hashing_algorithm_logindefs, set_password_hashing_algorithm_systemauth, sshd_disable_empty_passwords, sshd_disable_gssapi_auth, sshd_disable_rhosts, sshd_enable_pam, sshd_use_strong_ciphers, sshd_use_strong_kex, sshd_use_strong_macs
